mapper.select: SELECT ccup.*, w.waybill_number, w.container_number, w.route_name, w.business_date, w.load_time, v.vehicle_number, s.short_name, o.order_no, oc.oil_card_no FROM t_car_cost_urea_pay ccup LEFT JOIN t_waybill w ON ccup.waybill_id = w.waybill_id LEFT JOIN t_vehicle v ON w.vehicle_id = v.vehicle_id LEFT JOIN t_shipper s ON w.shipper_id = s.shipper_id LEFT JOIN t_order o ON w.order_id = o.order_id LEFT JOIN t_oil_card oc ON ccup.oil_card_id = oc.oil_card_id WHERE ccup.urea_pay_id = #{moduleId}

SELECT ccup.*, oc.oil_card_no, v.vehicle_number FROM t_car_cost_urea_pay ccup LEFT JOIN t_oil_card oc ON ccup.oil_card_id = oc.oil_card_id LEFT JOIN t_vehicle v ON ccup.vehicle_id = v.vehicle_id WHERE waybill_id = #{waybillId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
